{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The memory crystal of Snail Shell's former owner Titanium Chariot contains the following memory: A robot holding onto a box, hiding in the corner of an alley. The Snail in the box emits a weak field. Warning! Crystal error! Do not download data into the crystal!
|affct=TECH
|hard=RUSH
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=8816
|relic1=Fuel Cell
|relic2=Linde's Fridge
|relic3=Ark Reactor
|relic4=Tesla Coil
|relic5=Quantum Cat
}}
|color=blue
|earth=9
|water=8
|fire=9
|wind=8
|form=Mecha
|element=Water
|realm=Yamato
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
